doc_title_en: Notice of Revisions to Full-Year Business Performance Forecast and Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase) for FY3/26

key_facts.reason_jp: 第３四半期累計期間における利益堅調（ライフライン関連堅調、半導体・通信業界向け好調、モビリティ案件前倒し）

summary_en: Final dividend for FY3/26 (year ending June 2026) raised from ¥240/share to ¥350/share (+¥110, 46% increase). Full-year dividend now ¥350/share vs. prior forecast of ¥240/share. Payout ratio targeted at 40%. Revision driven by Q3 outperformance in utilities, semiconductors, telecoms, and acceleration of mobility projects.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を240円から350円に修正（+110円、46%増）。通期配当350円。配当性向40%目処。Q3業績好調（水道・ガス・電力、半導体・通信、モビリティ案件前倒し）を受け修正。
tag_en: Dividend hike - FY3/26 final dividend raised to ¥350/share (+¥110) - payout ratio ~40%
tag_jp: 増配 - FY3/26期末配当を350円/株に修正（+110円）- 配当性向40%目処
